youtube.description:
I don't play video games enough. I might be the best, also my elbows are cold.

Disclaimer: I am NOT Technoblade. This is all for the love of the game. I Make ZERO Profit From This. I hope the videos make you happy!

Original avatar before recolor by: https://twitter.com/AmyTheMudkip
Banner: https://youtube.com/@suspiciouspigmen?si=2-1Vd4llqao-e0I-

Larptuber Discord: discord.gg/larptube

Hi, I'm Larpiplier. I make videos.

From quality content(?) to meme-able garbage, from scary games to full-on non-interactive movies which you wont find it all. You will, actually. I dont have over 5000 videos (yet) so I'm sure there's something you'd DEFINITELY like (soon).

Maybe you like horror games, or funny games, or comedy sketches, or animations, or compilations, or reactions, or reviews, or challenges, or cryptic lore, or mind-crippling ennui, or stuff-that-is-guaranteed-to-probably-make-you-cry (probably not)? Whatever you're into I'm sure there's something for you down in the briny deep of my video page (soon). So why not dive in (there's no water yet dude)?

Or don't (pls do). Life is yours to choose after all.

For SERIOUS business inquiries: Larpiplier@gmail.com
hi! subscribe for funny moments and cool larps! :)

Welcome to my channel!  I'm going to be trying to upload lots of Minecraft Videos! I also might upload random games and content sometimes. I try to imitate(larp) SSundee's older style of Minecraft content.

"yesssh dudes"

Welcome to my channel dudes! I upload a lot of funny Minecraft and Roblox Videos! I also upload random games. lol I yell a lot.
